title: Axis tiertagger
description:
/axistiertagger on
/axistiertagger off
/axistiertagger search <player>
/axistiertagger ( shows all commands)
body:
AxisTiersTagger is a client-side Fabric mod that fetches PvP tier data from its API and shows a player’s peak tier in their nametag with color  and gamemode icon. It supports search in chat for detailed per gamemode. It is intended for Minecraft 1.21.1–1.21.11 with
**Dependencies** fabricloader and ukulib.
